title: Your votes, their victory: 2025 Best of Mossel Bay winners announced
description: BUSINESS NEWS - Over the past four months,...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - Over the past four months, the people of Mossel Bay have spoken – and it is our privilege to announce and congratulate the winners of the 2025 Best of Mossel Bay Readers’ Choice Awards!","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - Over the past four months, the people of Mossel Bay have spoken – and it is our privilege to announce and congratulate the winners of the 2025 Best of Mossel Bay Readers’ Choice Awards!"},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Your nominations and votes for your favourite businesses allow us to showcase the pride and joy of our community."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The enthusiastic response from our loyal readers reaffirms just how valuable this project is – not only in celebrating excellence – but also uplifting and supporting businesses in our beautiful town.","html":"The enthusiastic response from our loyal readers reaffirms just how valuable this project is – not only in celebrating excellence – but also uplifting and supporting businesses in our beautiful town."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A big salute to every nominated business and our heartfelt congratulations to each of the 2025 category winners – you truly make Mossel Bay proud!","html":"A big salute to every nominated business and our heartfelt congratulations to each of the 2025 category winners – you truly make Mossel Bay proud!"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Looking ahead, we’re excited to share that the 2026 Best of Mossel Bay Readers’ Choice Awards will officially kick off in May 2026.","html":"Looking ahead, we’re excited to share that the 2026 Best of Mossel Bay Readers’ Choice Awards will officially kick off in May 2026."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"See all the 2025 winners here.","html":"See all the 2025
